steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to 'emphasize the order in which the supercontinents were formed.' The answer must make clear which came first and which came second, using the dates from the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Columbia formed long after Ur': directly establishes chronological order (Ur at 3.1 billion years ago, Columbia at 1.8 billion years ago) and emphasizes the temporal gap. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago but eventually broke apart': covers only Ur and focuses on its breakup, not the order between the two supercontinents. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Forming and breaking apart over hundreds of millions of years, supercontinents are made up of most or all of Earth's continents': discusses supercontinents generally without ordering specific examples. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Ur and Columbia were both supercontinents, single landmasses made up of most or all of Earth's continents': names both but omits their dates and any ordering between them. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
